svg.title: Self-Healing Runtime — how it works, how to test, where to run
svg.desc: Full lifecycle diagram of the Living Codebase project from fault detection through hot-swap

g.text: Class A: memory B: CFI C: invariant D: resource
mutate AST → verify constraints → best candidate wins
compare: traditional crash+restart vs self-healing runtime → get mean_ms / p99_ms / stddev
eBPF will NOT work on WSL2 / macOS natively
use a Linux VM or docker --privileged on those systems
